data.title: Donald Trump says Xi agrees Iran must open Strait of Hormuz, China calls war unjust | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: Following his Beijing summit, Trump says Xi supports reopening the Strait of Hormuz, while China calls the Iran war a conflict that “should never have happened.”
data.keywords: Iran,United States,China,oil,Donald Trump,Xi Jinping,strait of hormuz,Operation Epic Fury
